title: Cobblemon Clear Body Unnerfer
description: A datapack that undoes every move, ability, and item nerf ever made in the Pokemon games
body:
A simple datapack that undoes every nerf TPC and GameFreak have ever done to moves, abilities, items... and even stats.



Remember when moves were stronger?

Rember when gems did 50% instead of 30%?

... Remember when Gen 1 pokemon had Special stats which were sometimes weaker when the split happened?



This changes 0 of the buffs, only reverts nerfs.
Balanced? Probably not. Fun? I hope so! Fun in concept? Absolutely.
